characters.name: The Silver Comet (user's likeness)
characters.wardrobe: slate-blue fitted hero suit with a polished silver comet emblem (a circle with a swept tail) on the chest, flowing slate-blue cape with silver lining, no glasses, tousled silver-blond hair

shots.start_frame_prompt: epic cinematic film still, supercell tornado disaster blockbuster cinematography, ominous black-green storm sky, low golden light raking under the cloud base, dust and debris haze, anamorphic lens flare, large-format clarity, gentle film grain, a mile-wide wedge tornado chewing across a golden wheat field toward the horizon, towering black-green supercell sky above, a weathered split-rail fence in the foreground, dust curtain billowing, zero people

review_notes.why: tornado churns and advances over wheat, dust curtain

shots.action: Porch swing whips, door tears, funnel looms.
shots.start_frame_prompt: epic cinematic film still, supercell tornado disaster blockbuster cinematography, ominous black-green storm sky, low golden light raking under the cloud base, dust and debris haze, anamorphic lens flare, large-format clarity, gentle film grain, a white clapboard farmhouse with a wooden porch swing whipping on its chains and a screen door torn half off, the mile-wide wedge tornado looming huge in the background sky, sickly green storm light with golden rim on the house edge, debris skittering, zero people
shots.video_prompt: the porch swing whips violently on its chains, the screen door bangs and tears further, debris skitters across the yard, the tornado looms closer behind

review_notes.why: swing whips, door tears, funnel grows behind

shots.action: A red kite is ripped into the storm.
shots.start_frame_prompt: epic cinematic film still, supercell tornado disaster blockbuster cinematography, ominous black-green storm sky, low golden light raking under the cloud base, dust and debris haze, anamorphic lens flare, large-format clarity, gentle film grain, a single red kite ripped sideways through the air with its tail snapping, dark debris and straw streaming past, the grey wall of the wedge tornado filling the background, dim dust-filtered light, zero people
shots.video_prompt: the red kite is torn sideways across the frame and sucked toward the funnel, its tail snapping, straw streaming past, the storm wall churning behind

shots.action: A silver streak cuts the storm sky.
shots.start_frame_prompt: epic cinematic film still, supercell tornado disaster blockbuster cinematography, ominous black-green storm sky, low golden light raking under the cloud base, dust and debris haze, anamorphic lens flare, large-format clarity, gentle film grain, one silver streak with a white contrail cutting left to right across the black-green storm sky beneath the cloud base, the mile-wide wedge tornado at the right of frame, a golden break of light where the streak passes
shots.video_prompt: the silver streak cuts left to right across the storm sky trailing a contrail and banks toward the tornado, the dark clouds churn around it

review_notes.why: silver streak banks toward the storm

shots.action: The Comet dives at the funnel.

review_notes.why: hero dives toward funnel, cape streaming

shots.action: Debris orbits him at the wall.

shots.action: He flies counter to the spin.
shots.start_frame_prompt: epic cinematic film still, supercell tornado disaster blockbuster cinematography, ominous black-green storm sky, low golden light raking under the cloud base, dust and debris haze, anamorphic lens flare, large-format clarity, gentle film grain, interior of a tornado, the towering inner wall of the funnel spiralling around <<<a895b77d-5fdb-4d8a-8964-e0cf6e88d773>>>, a mid-50s man, slate-blue fitted hero suit with a polished silver comet emblem (a circle with a swept tail) on the chest, flowing slate-blue cape with silver lining, no glasses, tousled silver-blond hair, centered mid-air with fists out, a faint disc of grey sky far above, eerie filtered daylight from the vortex top, dust motes streaming, one man only

review_notes.why: counter-spin inside the throat - THE money shot, vortex slows around him

shots.start_frame_prompt: epic cinematic film still, supercell tornado disaster blockbuster cinematography, ominous black-green storm sky, low golden light raking under the cloud base, dust and debris haze, anamorphic lens flare, large-format clarity, gentle film grain, 50mm close-up of <<<a895b77d-5fdb-4d8a-8964-e0cf6e88d773>>>, a mid-50s man, slate-blue fitted hero suit with a polished silver comet emblem (a circle with a swept tail) on the chest, flowing slate-blue cape with silver lining, no glasses, tousled silver-blond hair, streaming dust and faint debris past his face, the vortex glowing behind him, cold vortex light with a warm under-glow building, jaw set with effort, one man only

shots.action: The funnel dies; sun breaks through.
shots.start_frame_prompt: epic cinematic film still, supercell tornado disaster blockbuster cinematography, ominous black-green storm sky, low golden light raking under the cloud base, dust and debris haze, anamorphic lens flare, large-format clarity, gentle film grain, the mile-wide wedge tornado unraveling into harmless ribbons of cloud over the wheat fields, debris beginning to fall straight down, a shaft of golden sun breaking through the cracking black-green sky, zero people

review_notes.why: funnel unravels, sun shaft breaks through

shots.action: Nod to the clear sky, lifts off.

review_notes.why: looks to clear sky, nod, lifts off cape-last over calm field

music.prompt: ominous low brass drone and anxious tremolo strings, building dread, a distant storm-warning siren motif underneath
soaring heroic orchestral superhero theme, bold brass over driving strings, a straining intense mid-passage, then a broad warm resolution and one grand final chord

sfx.prompt: deep tornado roar, howling wind, rattling debris, distant tornado warning siren
rising superhero dive wind shriek, fast air rush
full tornado vortex roar with whipping debris, slowly dropping in pitch as it weakens
howling wind dying down to a gentle breeze and quiet, a single meadowlark birdcall, peaceful settling
